the previous BettingSwapRouter + StreamSwapRouter with a single      contract that centralises all Kayen DEX interactions. Supported Payment Paths (all settle in USDC): \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 BETTING:   CHZ  (native) -> USDC -> BettingMatch.placeBetUSDCFor  (placeBetWithCHZ)   ERC20         -> USDC -> BettingMatch.placeBetUSDCFor  (placeBetWithToken)   USDC direct   ->         BettingMatch.placeBetUSDCFor  (placeBetWithUSDC) STREAMING (donations & subscriptions):   CHZ  (native) -> USDC -> fee split -> streamer / treasury   ERC20         -> USDC -> fee split -> streamer / treasury   USDC direct   ->         fee split -> streamer / treasury Security Notes:   - This contract requires SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE on each target BettingMatch proxy   - All USDC flows through this contract but is immediately forwarded (no holding)   - Reentrancy protected via OpenZeppelin ReentrancyGuard   - SafeERC20 used for all token transfers   - Strict deadline + slippage validation on every swap","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_masterRouter":"Kayen MasterRouterV2 (native CHZ swaps)","_platformFeeBps":"Platform fee in basis points (max 10 000)","_tokenRouter":"Kayen token router (ERC20-to-ERC20 swaps)","_treasury":"Platform treasury address","_usdc":"USDC token address","_wchz":"Wrapped CHZ (WCHZ) address"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"placeBetWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amountOutMin":"Minimum USDC to accept (slippage protection)","bettingMatch":"Address of the BettingMatch proxy","deadline":"Unix timestamp deadline for the swap","marketId":"Market identifier","selection":"User's pick (outcome ID)"}},"placeBetWithToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens to spend","amountOutMin":"Minimum USDC to accept (slippage protection)","bettingMatch":"Address of the BettingMatch proxy","deadline":"Unix timestamp for swap expiry","marketId":"Market identifier","selection":"User's pick (outcome ID)","token":"ERC20 token to swap (WCHZ, fan token, etc.)"}},"placeBetWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint64,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"USDC amount to bet (caller must approve first)","bettingMatch":"Address of the BettingMatch proxy","marketId":"Market identifier","selection":"User's pick (outcome ID)"}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setMatchFactory(address)":{"details":"MUST be set before any `placeBetWith*` call. Validation is ALWAYS enforced      in `_placeBetOnBehalf`; pre-registration means every bet reverts with      `BettingMatchFactoryNotSet`. No silent-forward path exists."},"setStreamWalletFactory(address)":{"details":"Validates that this router is already set as swapRouter on the factory,      preventing a misconfiguration where streaming calls silently revert.      Correct setup order: (1) deploy router, (2) factory.setSwapRouter(router),      (3) router.setStreamWalletFactory(factory)."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"bettingMatchFactory":{"details":"MUST be set before any `placeBetWith*` call \u2014 validation is always enforced.      If unset, all betting entrypoints revert with `BettingMatchFactoryNotSet`.      Deploy flow: deploy this router, deploy factory, call `setMatchFactory(factory)`."}},"title":"ChilizSwapRouter","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"BettingMatchFactoryNotSet()":[{"notice":"Thrown when a bet is attempted before the BettingMatchFactory has been         registered via `setMatchFactory`. Prevents silent USDC theft through         unvalidated `bettingMatch` addresses."}],"RouterNotConfiguredOnFactory()":[{"notice":"Thrown when setStreamWalletFactory is called but the factory's swapRouter         is not this contract \u2014 prevents a misconfiguration that would silently         revert every streaming recording call."}],"UnauthorizedBettingMatch(address)":[{"notice":"Thrown when bettingMatch was not deployed by the registered factory"}]},"kind":"user","methods":{"bettingMatchFactory()":{"notice":"BettingMatchFactory for validating that bettingMatch addresses are legitimate."},"donateWithCHZ(address,string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Donate to a streamer: swap CHZ -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury"},"donateWithToken(address,uint256,address,string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Donate to a streamer: swap any ERC20 -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury"},"donateWithUSDC(address,string,uint256)":{"notice":"Donate to a streamer directly with USDC (no swap)"},"masterRouter()":{"notice":"Kayen DEX master router (native CHZ swaps)"},"placeBetWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Swap exact native CHZ for USDC and place a USDC bet"},"placeBetWithToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Swap any ERC20 token for USDC and place a USDC bet"},"placeBetWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint64,uint256)":{"notice":"Place a bet directly with USDC (no swap needed)"},"platformFeeBps()":{"notice":"Platform fee in basis points (e.g., 500 = 5%)"},"setMatchFactory(address)":{"notice":"Register the BettingMatchFactory so that bettingMatch addresses are validated         before USDC is forwarded to them (M-02 fix)."},"setStreamWalletFactory(address)":{"notice":"Register the StreamWalletFactory for wallet recording."},"streamWalletFactory()":{"notice":"StreamWalletFactory for wallet lookup/creation"},"subscribeWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Subscribe to a streamer: swap CHZ -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury"},"subscribeWithToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Subscribe to a streamer: swap any ERC20 -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury"},"subscribeWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Subscribe to a streamer directly with USDC (no swap)"},"tokenRouter()":{"notice":"Kayen DEX token router (ERC20-to-ERC20 swaps)"},"treasury()":{"notice":"Platform treasury for streaming fee collection"},"usdc()":{"notice":"USDC token address"},"wchz()":{"notice":"Wrapped CHZ (WCHZ) address"}},"notice":"Unified swap router for the entire ChilizTV platform.         Handles token-to-USDC swaps for **both** betting and streaming owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp deadline for the swap

params.token: ERC20 token to swap (WCHZ, fan token, etc.)

params.amount: USDC amount to bet (caller must approve first)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setMatchFactory(address).details: MUST be set before any `placeBetWith*` call. Validation is ALWAYS enforced      in `_placeBetOnBehalf`; pre-registration means every bet reverts with      `BettingMatchFactoryNotSet`. No silent-forward path exists.

setStreamWalletFactory(address).details: Validates that this router is already set as swapRouter on the factory,      preventing a misconfiguration where streaming calls silently revert.      Correct setup order: (1) deploy router, (2) factory.setSwapRouter(router),      (3) router.setStreamWalletFactory(factory).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

bettingMatchFactory().notice: BettingMatchFactory for validating that bettingMatch addresses are legitimate.

donateWithCHZ(address,string,uint256,uin.notice: Donate to a streamer: swap CHZ -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury

donateWithToken(address,uint256,address,.notice: Donate to a streamer: swap any ERC20 -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury

donateWithUSDC(address,string,uint256).notice: Donate to a streamer directly with USDC (no swap)

masterRouter().notice: Kayen DEX master router (native CHZ swaps)

placeBetWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint64,u.notice: Swap exact native CHZ for USDC and place a USDC bet

placeBetWithToken(address,uint256,addres.notice: Swap any ERC20 token for USDC and place a USDC bet

placeBetWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint64,.notice: Place a bet directly with USDC (no swap needed)

setMatchFactory(address).notice: Register the BettingMatchFactory so that bettingMatch addresses are validated         before USDC is forwarded to them (M-02 fix).

setStreamWalletFactory(address).notice: Register the StreamWalletFactory for wallet recording.

subscribeWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Subscribe to a streamer: swap CHZ -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury

subscribeWithToken(address,uint256,addre.notice: Subscribe to a streamer: swap any ERC20 -> USDC and send to streamer/treasury

subscribeWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint25.notice: Subscribe to a streamer directly with USDC (no swap)

treasury().notice: Platform treasury for streaming fee collection
